---
title: "Recent Work"
editor:
  markdown:
    wrap: 72
---

This page summarizes recent engineering and research directions in a
public-safe form. It is intended to show the technical scope of my work
without exposing client information, internal system details, or
non-public products.

::: {.callout-note}
Due to confidentiality requirements, this page only describes generalized
technical workflows and personal contributions. Internal code, datasets,
system implementation details, screenshots, and operational product
examples are not publicly displayed.
:::

## Recent Engineering and Research Directions

### Polar-orbiting Satellite Fire Detection and Preprocessing

I have worked on preprocessing and sample-preparation workflows for
polar-orbiting satellite fire detection. The public-safe description
includes fire-point matching, feature extraction, positive / negative
sample construction, and preparation for machine-learning-based fire
detection experiments.

### Operational Remote Sensing Product Generation

Recent engineering work has involved automated generation of remote
sensing products, time-series compositing, raster statistics, thematic
mapping, and structured outputs for downstream operational systems.

### Crop Growth and Yield Estimation Workflows

I have contributed to crop growth assessment and county-level yield
estimation workflows using satellite-derived vegetation indicators,
meteorological variables, crop distribution information, county
boundaries, and statistical yield records.

### Explainable GeoAI for Wildfire Risk Prediction

In parallel with engineering work, my research direction focuses on
explainable GeoAI for wildfire risk prediction, including machine
learning, spatial heterogeneity, SHAP-based interpretation, and
GeoShapley-based regional mechanism analysis.

### Technical Documentation and System Design

I also contribute to technical documentation, workflow summaries,
testing notes, and system-design communication that translate remote
sensing algorithms into reproducible and maintainable engineering
processes.
